lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused addEdge) — not in owned files, no new warnings introduced

notes: BUG-023: Root cause — custom DialogTitle in ui/dialog.tsx wraps a plain <h2>, NOT DialogPrimitive.Title. Radix's DialogContent wraps DialogPrimitive.Content which checks at mount for a DialogPrimitive.Title registered via React context; a plain <h2> is invisible to this check. Fix in canvas-view.tsx: import * as DialogPrimitive from '@radix-ui/react-dialog' and use DialogPrimitive.Title directly with matching styles. Added explanatory comment. section-detail-panel.tsx has the same root cause (read-only file, not owned by this task) — the Save as Template dialog will still produce the warning until dialog.tsx DialogTitle is changed to wrap DialogPrimitive.Title. IMP-036: Restructured loading/error/content ternary — previously templateError hid starters entirely. Now: loading=skeletons; non-loading=grid with error message at top when error, DB templates hidden on error, starters always visible. IMP-030: All icon-only buttons in both canvas-view.tsx (Templates, Color, Delete template) and tab-bar.tsx (Close tab, Add tab) already had aria-label attributes — no changes needed.
